label: 第49話
source_locator: 単行本6巻 目次 p.109
summary_short: 黒閃を経験した虎杖は呪力の本質への理解を深める。東堂も参戦し、二人の連携に対して花御は戦いそのものを楽しみ始める。
summary_full: 黒閃を経験した虎杖は、それまで感覚だけで扱っていた呪力の輪郭を明瞭に捉える。花御は傷を修復して外套を脱ぎ、広範囲の木の枝、呪いの種子、足場を消す攻撃を繰り出す。虎杖と東堂は互いを足場にして回避し、同時攻撃で対抗する。花御は花畑で二人の戦意を一時的に奪い、真人から「呪いとしての本能に従え」と言われた記憶を思い出す。戦闘の高揚を自覚した花御に対し、東堂は自分の術式を解禁する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: After unleashing 黒閃 , 悠仁 's strength grows to a new level. 葵 backs him up as they take on 花御 's full power. As the fight intensifies and 花御 attempts to teach the tandem of sorcerers to appreciate the earth, the 呪霊 begins to find enjoyment in the thrill of the fight.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " So... shall we get to cooking?! " 悠仁's 黒閃 blows 花御's arms apart with its impact as 葵 watches proudly from the side. 悠仁 is surprised by the essence of his 呪力. 葵 notices this and compares 悠仁 to a chef who's been haphazardly cooking ingredients they're not familiar with.  With 黒閃, 悠仁 has learned to harness his 呪力 and now is on a different level of power than he was a few moments ago. 葵 congratulates 悠仁 because now he's assured to be strong. Confused, 花御 was told 宿儺 's vessel was a sub-par sorcerer and he's also still very cautious of 葵's presence. As 花御 heals, 葵 reveals to 悠仁 that special grades can effortlessly heal using their own 呪力. However, 花御's 呪力 is wavering and the duo of best friends pose for battle, ready to get cooking. 悠仁 and 葵 work together to fight 花御. Impressed by his opponent's strength, 花御 removes his robe, revealing his black arm attached to a rosebud growing out of his shoulder. 花御 admits he needs to try harder and instantly unleashes a torrent of wooden branches which 葵 and 悠仁 are narrowly able to avoid. 悠仁 is amazed by the attack range but 葵 tells him that the 呪霊 sacrifices their power and speed in exchange. 花御 morphs out of the branches and fires Cursed Buds from is fingers which the sorcerers are also able to avoid. They counter with a double straight that damages 花御's jujutsu guard. Just as they prepare to follow up, their footing disappears. 花御 allows himself to enjoy the thrill of battle. The branches that 花御 appeared to be manipulating were actually created by jujutsu and were dispelled instantly. 花御 balances himself on a wooden ball while 葵 and 悠仁 fall. He attempts to skewer them both, but the duo kick-off of one another to dodge the wooden spikes protruding from the ball. 花御 begins to notice that he's enjoying the fight. He recalls a conversation with 真人 where the patch-faced 呪霊 encouraged 花御 to give in to his instincts as a 呪霊, believing that doing so would make him even more powerful. 花御 stuns the enemy tandem with a field of flowers and follows up with a sudden torrent of branches. While the sorcerers evade and the fight rages on, 花御 admits to himself that he's having fun. 葵 checks up on his protégé and decides that it's time to release his 術式!
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 花御 虎杖悠仁 東堂葵 真人 (回想)
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 京都姉妹校交流会 虎杖悠仁 & 東堂葵 vs. 花御 虎杖悠仁 & 東堂葵 vs. 花御
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 言及のみ：術式 黒閃 不義遊戯 反転術式 術式

key_events_verified_phase3: 虎杖が黒閃後の呪力感覚を得る
花御が外套を脱いで攻撃を拡大する
花御が戦闘を楽しみ始める
東堂が術式使用を宣言する
verification_notes_phase3: 集英社公式の単行本目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第三段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
